author: Alex S
subject: v2.2.0-beta.1
body: # [2.2.0-beta.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.1.4...v2.2.0-beta.1) (2017-09-18) ### Features * **analytics:** Push pagination ([#2337](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2337)) ([94ce086](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/94ce086)) * **hitsPerPageSelector:** default hits per page setting ([4efd43e](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/4efd43e)) * **hitsPerPageSelector:** default hits per page setting ([355f080](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/355f080))
